items.summary: Implement teacher login using mobile number and U-DISE number as credentials. On the Login page, the Teacher tab must accept both a mobile number field and a U-DISE number field. Authentication must validate the combination against stored teacher login records (TeacherLogin entries in localStorage). On successful login, store the teacher's U-DISE number in the auth session so all subsequent pages can access it.

On the Home page (HomePage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, display stats (total students, results entered, results pending) and the progress bar filtered exclusively to the logged-in teacher's U-DISE number. Admins continue to see data for all schools.

On the School Info page (SchoolInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, show only the school record matching the teacher's U-DISE number. Add and edit actions should be hidden or disabled for teacher role; only admins can add/edit/delete school records. Admins see all schools.
On the Teacher Info page (TeacherInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, show only teacher records whose U-DISE number matches the logged-in teacher's U-DISE. Admins see all teacher records.

On the Student Info page (StudentInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, display only students whose school U-DISE matches the logged-in teacher's U-DISE. The UDISE field in the add/edit form should be pre-filled and locked to the teacher's U-DISE. Admins see all students.

On the Enter Results page (EnterResultPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, the student list must be filtered to show only students from the teacher's U-DISE school. Admins can see students from all schools.

On the Progress Report page (ProgressReportPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, pre-fill and lock the U-DISE filter field to the teacher's U-DISE number so they can only view progress reports for their own school's students. Admins can enter any U-DISE.

On the Student Result Print page (StudentResultPrintPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, pre-fill and lock the U-DISE filter to the teacher's U-DISE number so they can only search and print results for their school's students. Admins can enter any U-DISE.

Ensure the sidebar navigation (DashboardLayout.tsx) for the teacher role includes links to all the following pages: Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Results, Progress Report, and Student Result Print — all visible and accessible to the teacher role.
